name: The Entrance To Cheers Bar
description:
Making your way in the world today takes everything you've got.  Taking a
break from all your worries sure would help a lot -- well, we think you know
the rest.  Anyway, this is just a place where you can sit back and enjoy a
drink with Norm and the guys.  And if that gets old, (it sure hasn't with Norm)
you're sure to find something else to do.  The Main Bar is to the west,
Broadway is to the east.
